errors.unknownStep: We couldn't find that setup step. Take me back to the start.
errors.slugTaken: That web address is already taken.
errors.slugInvalid: Use lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only.
errors.createFailed: Something went wrong creating your business. Please try again.
errors.rewardRequired: Set the reward customers will earn.

welcome.title: Welcome to Stampeo
welcome.subtitle: In a few minutes, your loyalty card lands in your customers' wallets.
welcome.body: We'll build a branded digital card, send a stamp to your own phone, then push a broadcast to it so you feel exactly what your customers will. The required steps get you live. Everything else makes your program more polished from day one.

identity.title: Identity
identity.subtitle: Tell us what your business is called and where to find it.

fields.name: Business name
fields.slugHelp: Your card link will be stampeo.app/{slug}

profile.title: Tell us about your business
profile.subtitle: Four quick questions so we can tune templates, recommendations, and metrics to fit.

program.title: Set up your loyalty program
program.subtitle: How many stamps it takes, and what your customers earn.

data-collection.title: What to collect from customers
data-collection.subtitle: Pick the fields you want on the signup form.

intro.title: Your card has two sides
intro.subtitle: Front for stamps, back for the practical info.
intro.bodyP1: On Apple Wallet, customers tap the three dots on the card to flip it. On Google Wallet, the i icon. Either way, they land on the info you put there: hours, address, phone, website, terms and conditions, anything worth showing.
intro.bodyP2: You'll add it all now, once. Later, when you design each card, you'll pick which entries to include and add extras that only apply to that design.

info.title: Add your business info
info.subtitle: These entries will be available on every design of your card. We pre-filled what we could from your account.

branding.title: Logo and colors
branding.subtitle: Drop your logo, pick your colors. The defaults work; refine whenever you want.

stamps.title: Stamps
stamps.subtitle: Pick stamp and reward icons, then tune their colors.

content.title: Extra info on the front
content.subtitle: Limit, expiry, anything else worth surfacing on the card itself.

back.title: What appears on the back of THIS design
back.subtitle: Pick which business info to show on this card, and add any extras that only apply here.
back.sharedSectionHelper: Tick the ones to show on this design.
back.specificSectionHelper: Fields you add here only appear on this design.
back.specificEmpty: Nothing yet. Add a field that should only appear on this design.

icon.title: Pick the icon for notifications
icon.subtitle: Customers receive a push every time you stamp them or they earn a reward. This icon shows next to each one, so most owners use their logo.
icon.autoFilledHint: Auto-filled from your logo. Replace any time.

first-stamp.title: Take it for a spin
first-stamp.chapterIntro: Install your card, then send yourself a real stamp.

install.title: Get a card on a phone
install.subtitle: Yours or a real customer's. The next step needs a card installed somewhere.
install.explanation: This is the public page your customers will land on. Share the link in your bio or socials, print the QR at your counter, or open it on your own phone to install your first card right now.
install.qrBody: Stick it at your point of sale, drop it on a menu, or scan it with your own phone to register as your first customer.
install.quickInstallBody: Fastest path. We register you using your account details and hand you the wallet buttons.
install.installTitle: Add the card to your wallet
install.installBody: Tap a button below. The card lands in your wallet, ready for the test stamp on the next step.
install.pollingHint: Keep this tab open. We detect the signup automatically.
install.watchingInstall: Customer detected. Waiting for the card to land in your wallet…
install.manualConfirmCta: I've added it to my wallet
install.detected: Card installed. Moving on in a moment.

stamp.title: Stamp yourself
stamp.subtitle: Every tap fires a real push to your phone.
stamp.prereqBody: Go back to the previous step and add the card to your wallet. Without it, no push lands.
stamp.readyBody: Tap below. We fire a real stamp; your phone buzzes within a few seconds.
stamp.keepStampingBody: Each tap fires another real push. Try a few; see how the messages flow on your phone.
stamp.coalesceHint: Apple Wallet groups rapid pass updates. Leave roughly 20s between stamps so each one buzzes your lock screen.
stamp.fallback: No buzz yet? Push can take a few seconds. Try again in a moment.
stamp.customisationHint: The text of that message? You can change it, add more at specific stamp counts, or turn them off. All from the notifications page in your dashboard later.

intro.title: Broadcasts, in one minute
intro.subtitle: A push notification you send manually to every installed card at once.
intro.whatItIsBody: One push notification, sent to every customer with your card installed. Useful for limited-time offers, events, new menu items, or anything you'd post on your socials.
intro.differentFromBody: Stamp-added and reward-earned messages fire by themselves when something happens. Broadcasts are the opposite: you decide when, you decide what.
intro.audienceOfOneTitle: Right now your audience is one person
intro.audienceOfOneBody: The only installed card so far is yours. So the broadcast you write next lands on your own phone. That's exactly the experience your real customers will get when you have an actual audience.

compose.title: Write a broadcast and send it to yourself
compose.subtitle: One short message. It lands on your phone the moment you tap send.
compose.composeBody: Write something you'd actually send to customers. Treat your own phone as the test seat: the wording, the timing, the buzz, everything will be exactly the same when you send to a real audience later.
compose.titleHint: Defaults to your business name. Appears in bold on the lock-screen banner.
compose.bodyPlaceholder: Happy hour today, 5pm to 7pm. Show your card for 20% off.
compose.recipientsLine: {count, plural, =0 {No installed cards yet. Try the previous step first.} =1 {This lands on your own phone.} other {# installed customers will receive this.}}
compose.sendCta: {count, plural, =1 {Send it to my phone} other {Send to # customers}}
compose.sendingProgress: Dispatching the push. Usually 10 to 20 seconds.
compose.sendFailed: The broadcast couldn't be sent. Try again in a moment.
compose.deliveredTitle: {count, plural, =0 {No pushes delivered yet} =1 {Pushed to your phone} other {Pushed to # devices}}
compose.deliveredHint: {count, plural, =1 {Same exact experience your customers will get when you broadcast to a real audience.} other {{delivered} of {total} customers got the push. {skipped, plural, =0 {} =1 {1 customer skipped, card not installed.} other {# customers skipped, card not installed.}}}}

team.title: Bring your team in
team.subtitle: Two kinds of access, depending on what they need to do.

adminRole.label: Admin
adminRole.description: Full dashboard access, same as you. Can change the program, send broadcasts, manage the team. Good for co-founders and managers.

scannerRole.label: Scanner
scannerRole.description: Only the stamping screen on their phone. No dashboard, no settings, no customer data. Good for staff working the counter.

team.inviteHint: They get an email with the right access. You can revoke at any time.

recap.title: Look at what you've built
recap.subtitle: A real loyalty program, on real phones, sending real notifications. Quick recap before we talk plans.
recap.stampsLabel: {count, plural, =0 {No stamps sent yet} =1 {1 stamp sent to your phone} other {# stamps sent to your phone}}
recap.teamLabel: {count, plural, =0 {Team: just you for now} =1 {Team: you and 1 invitation pending} other {Team: you and # invitations pending}}

plan.title: Choose your plan
plan.subtitle: You're on a 30-day Pro trial. Pick a plan now, or keep exploring on the trial.
plan.downgradeBody: Some of what you've set up isn't available on Starter:
